card.name: critical_customers
card.title: 🚨 CRITICAL Tier
card.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk WHERE risk_tier = 'CRITICAL'

card.name: high_customers
card.title: 🔴 HIGH Tier
card.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk WHERE risk_tier = 'HIGH'

card.name: medium_customers
card.title: 🟡 MEDIUM Tier
card.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk WHERE risk_tier = 'MEDIUM'

card.name: top_at_risk
card.title: Top 25 At-Risk Customers
card.query: SELECT user_id, risk_tier, rule_based_score, recommended_action, weekly_risk_signals, engagement_health FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk ORDER BY rule_based_score DESC LIMIT 25

card.name: risk_distribution
card.title: Risk Tier Distribution
card.query: SELECT risk_tier, COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk GROUP BY risk_tier ORDER BY count DESC

card.name: engagement_health
card.title: Engagement Health Distribution
card.query: SELECT engagement_health, COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk GROUP BY engagement_health

card.name: score_distribution
card.title: Risk Score Distribution
card.query: SELECT ROUND(rule_based_score / 10) * 10 as score_bucket, COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_churn_risk GROUP BY ROUND(rule_based_score / 10) * 10 ORDER BY score_bucket DESC

card.name: intervention_count
card.title: Total Interventions Logged
card.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_interventions WHERE intervention_ts >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS

card.name: intervention_success
card.title: Intervention Success Rate
card.query: SELECT ROUND(100 * SUM(CASE WHEN retained_after_intervention THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as success_pct FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_interventions WHERE intervention_ts >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS AND retained_after_intervention IS NOT NULL

card.name: recent_interventions
card.title: Recent Interventions (Last 30 Days)
card.query: SELECT intervention_id, user_id, intervention_type, intervention_result, intervention_ts, retained_after_intervention FROM ${var.catalog}.${var.schema}.gold_interventions WHERE intervention_ts >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS ORDER BY intervention_ts DESC LIMIT 50
